entry.title: missing SAC optimized story functions
entry.content:
I'm using Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide to enhance my stories and I encounter lots of missing functions.

for example, I'm missing the export function 

I'm missing all of the functions in this link and more

Optimized Story Experience API Reference Guide Version 2023.8 (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: Configure Your Business Processes: An Introduction to SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Fabian,

Yes indeed you understood correctly. Can i somehow change the password and if yes what the new password need to contain. I need this because i want to add to the source system properties the OAuth2TokenServiceURL and when i add this the previous password disappearing and it ask me for a new one. 

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter June 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,
Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training courses, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.
The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

SAP Datasphere Connectivity Series

Good news! We’ve updated this series of E-Learnings on SAP Datasphere Connectivity with new assets on integration with Amazon S3 and Google BigQuery. Make deploying and integrating SAP Datasphere easier by completing these quick hit learnings!
Check out here: SAP Datasphere Connectivity Series

New! Discovery Center Mission for SAP Build Process Automation

Register for the first Discovery Center mission for SAP Enterprise Support for BTP. The mission helps you to get ramped-up and easily get started with SAP Build Process Automation.
Gain an overview and get started

New Dates in June: SAP Analytics Cloud EGI

Check out our recently refreshed content for the two virtual workshops on SAP Analytics Cloud BI and planning fundamentals. The sessions are multihour virtual sessions, delivered over 3-5 working days to you at no additional cost.
Save your seat and register through the blog post

All You Need to Know About SAP Cloud ALM

Join the EGI workshop and learn all about the benefits and capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM and to help you use its functionalities in your own environment. It combines Implementation, Operations, and Service topics to allow you to leverage the full potential of SAP Cloud ALM.

We have three sessions scheduled in June. Register here

Get Ready with SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA

Learn all about the SAP Readiness Check tool for SAP S/4HANA, and how it supports a successful conversion to SAP S/4HANA. We offer short and interactive live must-know sessions in multiple languages to get you prepared to start your SAP S/4HANA project.

Register here: SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA

Release Navigator for SAP Customer Experience: Q2 Update Available Now

We are excited to share that the Q2 updates to the release navigator for SAP Customer Experience had been automatically implemented, and include the most recent release enhancement, and information about future releases.

Access here

Unleashing the Power of Artificial Intelligence in Customer Support from SAP

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized the way businesses operate, opening doors to unprecedented opportunities for innovation and efficiency. Within the realm of customer support at SAP, these cutting-edge technologies play a crucial role in enhancing the customer experience and streamlining support processes.

Read more

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Seamlessly Integrated into SAP for Me

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network are live on SAP for Me! The customer portal is your new central entry point to support, simplifying support-related tasks by using a set of digital self-service features to easily request support and resolve issues. SAP for Me is made for you!

Read more

Your Ultimate Guide for SAP Sapphire 2024 Orlando!

Gain valuable insights into innovative technologies and strategies that are shaping the future of customer support and business transformation. Mark your calendars for these must-attend sessions! See you soon at this year´s SAP Sapphire 2024 in Orlando from June 3-5.

Check it out!

Enhancing Support Experiences with Support Accreditation

Learn how Support Accreditation enhances the support experience for partners and customers. Get valuable insights on efficient problem resolution and how to interact with support teams for optimal results. The training incorporates the latest in AI and machine learning to prepare you for the future of support services. Don't miss out on leveraging these benefits and optimizing your service experience with SAP!

Read more in the interview

Success Story: LG Group

The LG Group is thankful to the SAP Mission Control Center team for their dedication and teamwork, which ensured the success of a critical event for LG. They appreciate the MCC team's support and look forward to continued collaboration for LG's future success.

Link: sap.to/61101XbYkP

 

  • Guidance on signing up
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance
  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)
  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document
  • FAQ
  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps
  • SAP Support Portal
  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |
  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program
  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar
  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America

entry.title: Re: Dangerous Goods Check for Transportation with Product Compliance in SAP S/4HANA

we are supporting besides the "ready-packed" Dangerous Goods Process also the "Tank/Bulk Container Filling" Dangerous Goods Process as illustrated on the following slides:

 

Here the link to the documentation: Specific Information for Packaged Dangerous Goods | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,
Marianne Sigmund

entry.title: Re: Error: Effective restriction for key date is not corr...
entry.content: Thanks, Error resolved as per your suggested solution.

entry.title: Re: inventory counting SQL query with counted batch qty

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
@borah Welcome Bora!
We have an Istanbul group if you're interested to join?

entry.title: Public cloud - embedded EWM - automatic synchronous goods receipt production WITH automatic packing
entry.content:
Dear community,

Within the synchronous goods receipt process, is it possible to combine following features in 1 process:

  • PP: automatic goods receipt (GR automatically triggered based on confirmation CO11N)
  • PP-EWM: synchronous goods receipt
  • EWM: automatic packing via packing instructions

I have tried all determination records (0GRP, 0RCV, STOC, SHIP, ...) trying to achieve this, but without any success. It's only possible when I deactivate the automatic goods receipt process and perform it manually via MIGO. Then it works. But I would like it to be automated during production order confirmation.

Many thanks for any feedback

Kind regards,

Jens Koyen

entry.title: Re: Introducing – BPC Embedded Access Rights
entry.content:
Hi Pravin,

We have a hybrid solution with BW4/HANA (on prem.) and BPC Add-On with Live connection to SAC. Now every user in SAC, has a corresponding user in BW / BPC. What is the license type of the users in the On-Premise system, the one you put in SU01?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: Thanks for sharing @atsuko_eguchi - it's good to have your experience here in SAP Community!

entry.title: Integration of change documents in M2S in Siganvio
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I was just wondering whether there is also a transformation script for the M2S process in Signavio in which the change documents are considered. In the O2C or P2P Processes they are considered.
As far as I have understood correctly, the changes for production in the SAP system are not necessarily written and you might have to activate something so that you can track this. Or are there other ways of integrating production unit changes into Signavio?

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

Thanks a lot for your interest in our new Substance Volume Tracking solution in SAP S/4HANA for product compliance and for your detailed description below.

Substance Volume Tracking  in SAP S/4HANA for product compliance is still under development and will be continuously enhanced in the future. Currently the main focus in our Customer Engagement Sessions for SVT is on the evaluation of the SVT specific requirements for regulations like EU REACH, UK REACH, Turkey KKDIK, US TSCA, US TSCA SNUR, JP ISHL, JP CSCL and so on. 

The focus of the first version of the new Substance Volume Tracking solution, which you will find in the current SAP S/4HANA OnPremise, Private Cloud and Public Cloud releases, is on the following topics:

  • Implementation of a new architecture concept for SVT which is flexible enough to support various SVT relevant regulations and various SVT relevant business processes
  • Integration of SVT with the new Product Compliance Event and Task processing framework
  • Integration of SVT with the new Compliance Requirement concept in Product Compliance
  • Integration of SVT with the new Data Model in Product Compliance
  • Implementation of a new concept for retracking of substance volumes based on SVT relevant changes in e.g. compositions, compliance assessments, compliance requirement versions, legal entity mappings, ...
  • Introduction of a new concept for defining and mapping of Legal Entities which supports different Legal Entity definitions in different regulations (e.g. business place vs site vs plant vs company ...)
  • Providing an enhanced traceability of the tracked substance volumes by e.g. enabling a drill-down possibility in the SVT Monitor from the tracked substance volumes to the corresponding material documents
  • Implementation of a new concept for tracking produced substance volumes
  • ... and many more features (please see the SAP S/4HANA SVT online help for details: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/d8b79377f49a4d29a7003af45fd944d2.html?locale=en-US)

Important areas where we still have gaps or which are not supported in the current version of the solution are:

  • Support of specific business processes like Vendor Consignment, Subcontracting, Vendor Returns, Customer Consignment, Advanced Intercompany Sales, Third Party Sales Customer Returns, Re-import or Process/Production Orders with Rework
  • Support of specific regulatory requirements like e.g. certain exemption scenarios, only representative functionality, maintenance and consideration of substance registrations and notifications, tracking/aggregation of use specific substance volumes 
  • Tracking of planned quantities and the direct integration into the logistic/material management processes (which would also be the pre-requisite for blocking business process in cases where a threshold limit would be exceeded)

Based on these gaps we decided for the time being that we do not allow to enable customer specific compliance requirement definitions for SVT. 

Compliance Requirement versions which are already enabled for Substance Volume Tracking are:

  • EU REACH Registrations Status
  • GB REACH Registrations Status
  • TR KKDIK Registration Status
  • US TSCA Inventory Status
  • US TSCA SNUR Status
  • US TSCA CDR Status
  • JP ISHA Status
  • JP ENCS Status
  • JP CSCL PACS Status
  • JP CSCL General Chemicals

When testing SVT with these Compliance Requirements, please consider the description of the Compliance Requirement Versions, the SAP S/4HANA Help for SVT (see link above) and the gaps which are mentioned above.

In addition all Compliance Requirements which are part of our Best Practice Content for Substance Volume Tracking (Scope Item 4OL) are SVT enabled. See: ".. SVT 2020 June - Best Practice Content (Initial Version)" in the Manage Compliance Requirements - Product Marketability app. 
These Compliance Requirement Version definitions were created to allow customers to perform the test which are described in the Test Script of the 4OL Scope Item in all countries which are supported by the Best Practice Content.

By using the "Create New Version" functionality in the Manage Compliance Requirements (Product Marketability) app you can create your own versions of these Best Practice Compliance Requirements and enhance these versions with your own substance list definitions.

Create New Version based on existing version:

 

Edit and Release new Version:

Once you released and activated (App Activate Compliance Requirements - Product Marketability) such a new version of a Compliance Requirement Definition it will show up in the Enable Substance Volume Tracking - for Compliance Requirements app and can be used for own SVT tests. Again, please consider the SAP S/4HANA Help for SVT and the gaps which are mentioned above while testing.

The two new apps Manage Legal Entities and Manage Legal Entity Mappings are not only used for Substance Volume Tracking, but also for defining and determining the company specific part of the Korean SDS number (see https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6540a57e42314b5a8c208bca283e29e6/d5e23fccc7be47f9a1df284b0a75508d.html?locale=en-US for details). The business process scenario SELL IN is currently only supported for the SDS use case not not for SVT. I will discuss with my colleagues if we can find a way to better separate from a UI point of view better the two different use cases (SVT and SDS) in the app.

For the issue which you described at the end of your post when you tried to save the newly created Legal Entity mapping, please open a SAP message so that we can take a closer look at this problem.

I hope this helps.

Best regards,
Michael Schalk (SAP)
Product Manager for Substance Volume Tracking

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @atsuko_eguchi - which part of Germany? The reason I ask is that we have a few location groups for Germany, maybe there is one you would like to join ...

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I'm Quan from Vietnam. I identify as a person in the following categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Starting with an accounting background and a few years of experience working with SAP, I want to study for a SAP Certification to process further in my SAP career.

Thanks for your consideration.

Quan.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Monitoring All Model Import/Export Jobs

Hello Mohamed,

I wanted to know what's the time zone of the data coming in from Timestamp dimension from SAP__SAC_USAGE_ACTIVITIES model.

Could you please guide?

Thanks and Regards,

Sumit Lahare

entry.title: Multiple Value Help Fragments in SAP BTP Fiori apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a main XML view file that describes a table with colums and filters.
It uses smarttable and smartfilterbar.
The table gets data from a connected service of an external system.
The table has 5 filters and each filter is also based on one field in the fields the service opens.
Each filter also have a value help window where the user sees all the values of this field coming from the external source.
The user can then pick one value which then gets assigned as the actual filter value and is used to filter the table.
example:
There is an account ID filter.
when pressed the Account ID's value help opens where a user can pick a value that is then assigned as the Account ID filter value.


Each fragment's code looks roughly like this:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
    <SelectDialog
        id="selectDialog"
        title="Account ID's"
        items="{/AccountCollection}"
        search=".onValueHelpSearch"
        confirm=".onValueHelpClose"
        cancel=".onValueHelpClose">
        <StandardListItem id="_IDGenStandardListItem1"
            title="{InternalID}"
            description="{BusinessPartnerName}"/>
    </SelectDialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Each fragment uses several functions(like search=".onValueHelpSearch", confirm=".onValueHelpClose", cancel=".onValueHelpClose">) I need to write the code for in the controller.
When there are several fragments like that, the code becomes long and either has a lot of redundancy or becomes complex in managing the assignmnts of the different values of the different fragments to the fields and the actual filtration of the table.

I was wondering if there is some more straightforward way to achieve value help for multiple filters without having to write several functions per fragment or having complex central functions to handle all the fragments at once
.
I tried using an annotations file but there are issues there as well because the service im getting data from is odata 2.0 and not 4.0.

entry.title: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content:
Hello, i have the requirement to change the counted Result of a Physical Inventory, like you do in the Transaction LI12N.

I have already found a function module to enter count results -> L_INV_COUNT_EXT
But if i try to overwrite the Position i get the exception NO_COUNT_ALLOWED.
Has anyone a idea how to do this?

Kind Regards Niklas

Did you got the solution ?

entry.title: Merge almost identical process variants in Process Conformance
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I like to use the process conformance widgets in my investigation to make the traget/ actual comparison between the processes.
I have the question whether it is possible to merge almost identical process variants. I am thinking of when a certain event is executed 2 times and in a other variant 3 times and the other process is the same.

Is it possible to merge these variants, because there are always many different variants if just an event occurs several times.

Greetings Niels

entry.title: Re: Change documents for standard networks (CN01/02) aren...
entry.content:
Hi Andreas...

In the "Define parameters for standard network" IMG activity, under "Structures > Templates > Standard Network" the "creation of change documents active" indicator in the standard network profile must be checked.

Regards

Marcio Blos

entry.title: abap2UI5 - Host your Apps on SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Running abap2UI5 in an on-premise system and want to host your apps on the SAP Fiori Launchpad? This post briefly shows how to set up your ABAP system and launchpad for this scenario.

Connector for SAP Fiori Launchpad

Besides abap2UI5, which should already be on your system, we will install the project abap2UI5 - Connector SAP Fiori Launchpad (On-Stack) with abapGit and configure launchpad tiles for abap2UI5 apps:

abap2UI5 Apps hosted on SAP Fiori Launchpad

The connector works as follows:

 abap2UI5 running with the Connector for SAP Fiori Launchpad (On-Stack)

abap2UI5 is now also on LinkedIn. To generate some traffic for the page, you can find the full blog post there. I would appreciate your follow on LinkedIn.

LinkedIn

Yes, we are all there!

Follow us on LinkedIn.

entry.title: How to define user authorization for SAC with Public Cloud in Cloud Identity Services?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a SAC system connected to the Public Cloud. In Cloud Identity Services, the user role is Constant and Embedded BI Admin is given. In other words, everyone who has a user in the Public Cloud also has a user in the SAC, and all users have Admin authority.

However, instead, only some users should be defined as SAC users and only a few of these users should be given Admin authority. Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: sp_spaceused on mon tables
entry.content:
Monitoring (MDA) tables aren't real tables; they are special proxy tables that reference internal ASE counters and memory structures.

From Performance & Tuning Series: Monitoring Tables:

The data in the monitoring tables is not stored on disk. The data is calculated when you execute a query on one of the monitoring tables. Table definitions are contained in proxy table definitions that are created by a server installation script, which can be run manually automatically during server installation. These proxy tables use an interface to the SAP ASE to collect monitoring data when you perform a query.

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content: It throws that exception when a row for LINV has ISTAT <> 'N', but aside from that I'm not sure why you would have a requirement to change the result... the count result should simply be the result.

entry.title: BO 4.3 Cloud - No such file or directory
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

When scheduling a Webi report with Excel output to save in a folder on the server, the error sometimes occurs:

[No such file or directory]: [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmanaged] , occurs from time to time, and sometimes saving to the folder works.

Has anyone experienced this in BO 4.3 Cloud?

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am an SAP student and my interest in SAP started last year when I started my learning journey with SAP. My background is in finance and accounting where I have over 15 years experience working in finance roles. I have sought to expand my knowledge about SAP products and roles for an SAP consultant in the field, and I feel that the digital skills programme would allow me to do this. I am looking to upskill as part of my SAP journey to change my career from finance into tech and to secure a role in the tech industry as an end goal. I only heard about the digital skills programme a couple of weeks ago and I want to send my appreciation to David for putting this together and for making it easier for individuals that wish to pursue a career in SAP. Thanks!

Regards

Stuart

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content: Hi Bill and Muhammad, thanks, I've raised an incident and they replied with this new version. extension-SAMFoundation was missing in extensions folder downloaded from MDK Plugin

entry.title: cl_cds_test_environment for nested CDS views
entry.content:
i try to mock I_BillingDocument for tests,
but this works only for selects on I_BillingDocumentBasic and not at the root.

Can anyone tell me how to make select work based on I_BillingDocument? We are on HANA 2021.

 go_cds = cl_cds_test_environment=>create(  i_for_entity      = 'I_BillingDocument' "
                                                I_select_base_dependencies = abap_true ) .
     go_cds->enable_double_redirection( ).
    
     " mock data
     DATA: vbrk_t       TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF vbrk WITH EMPTY KEY.
     vbrk_t = VALUE #( ( vbeln = '1234567890'  ) ).
     go_cds->insert_test_data(  vbrk_t  ).
    
    
     " select - dosen't work
     SELECT billingdocument
        FROM I_BillingDocument
        INTO TABLE @DATA(itest1) UP TO 10 ROWS.
    
     " works
     SELECT billingdocument
        FROM I_BillingDocumentBasic
        INTO TABLE @DATA(itest2) UP TO 10 ROWS.

entry.title: Re: Send discount price ( SD price ) to third party system
entry.content: You can use COND_A for pricing condition records

Regards,

Leandro

entry.title: Re: how to control variable offset range [Analysis for Mi...
entry.content:
Hello @hajime78,
what you try to achieve seems to be similar to what in SAP BW can be achieved via "current member" variable:

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/en-US/d4/85021f664f4c118559db60f2ebc016/frameset.htm

I am no real SAP ABAP/SQL developer but I guess it will be quite difficult to achieve the same...

If you are a real developer then maybe you can solve this via a window function... but I cannot explain you how to do this in detail 😪

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content: Download the latest plugin and it should contains SAMFoundation

entry.title: how to use discover api - cloud integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to use an API present in the "discover api":

what are the steps to use it?

I made a copy of the api and created the proxies api

thanks

entry.title: Trigger an Emarsys Email Campaign via API using Postman/Bruno
entry.content:
In SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement you can send emails or trigger automation programs using an external event. That external event needs to be created via API since there is no standard functionality for an end user to trigger such an event.

In the Emarsys help there is also one page which describes the process: Bypassing opt-in status for triggered emails by API. In that page the API call is explained by using an API demo page in the last chapter. In this article I describe how to achieve the same by using an API client like Postman or Bruno. Nevertheless, please follow the guide above for the first 3 chapters before you continue to read further.

 

API Endpoint to Trigger an External Event

The API endpoint as described in the developer portal is: 

https://api.emarsys.net/api/v2/event/{eventId}/trigger 

Where {eventId} is the id of the event you created before. The body payload you need for this use case would look like this:

 

{
  "key_id": "3",
  "external_id": "",
  "data": null,
  "contacts": [
    {"external_id": "contact1@email.com"},
    {"external_id": "contact2@email.com"}
  ]
}

 

The field key_id '3' specifies that you will give email addresses in the 'contacts' section where you need to specify all the email addresses of the contacts you want to send the email to.

 

Example with Postman

Postman is a tool to set up and run API calls (Download). It has a free option but requires you to create an account. If you look for an entire local setup please read further down on Bruno. At the end of this article you find a JSON code which you can import into Postman as a new collection. After doing so you will need to expand the collection and open the single item 'Trigger External Event'.

First you need to adjust the script in tab 'Pre-Request Script' and exchange the string '<API User>' with your API user and the string '<Secret>' with your API secret (Keep the double quotes around!):

Furthermore you need to exchange the string '<EventID>' with the ID of the external event you created before. Then you need to adjust the email addresses in the tab 'Body' with your own data:

 Finally you just need to press on 'Send' and the external event should be triggered for all the contacts you provided.

 

Example with Bruno

Bruno is another API client which is free and runs completely locally (Download). You can use the same JSON file as explained in the Postman chapter:

After importing the collection you need to expand the collection and select the item 'Trigger External Event'. Then you have to adjust the script in tab 'Script' and exchange the string '<API User>' with your API user and the string '<Secret>' with your API secret (Keep the double quotes around!):

Furthermore you need to exchange the string '<EventID>' with the ID of the external event you created before. Then you need to adjust the email addresses in the tab 'Body' with your own data:

Finally you need to save and run and the external event should be triggered for all the contacts you provided.:

 

JSON Collection for Import

In the box below you find a Postman collection which you can copy and store as a JSON file (file extension .json). This can also be used as a collection import into Bruno. Please note that this is just an example code and comes with no warranty and no support!

 

{
	"info": {
		"name": "Trigger_Event",
		"schema": "https://schema.getpostman.com/json/collection/v2.1.0/collection.json"
	},
	"item": [
		{
			"name": "Trigger External Event",
			"event": [
				{
					"listen": "prerequest",
					"script": {
						"exec": [
							"const crypto_js = require('crypto-js');",
							"var ts = (new Date()).toISOString();",
							"var nonce = crypto_js.lib.WordArray.random(16).toString(crypto_js.enc.Hex);",
							"var digest = crypto_js.enc.Base64.stringify(crypto_js.enc.Utf8.parse(crypto_js.SHA1(nonce + ts + \"<Secret>\").toString(crypto_js.enc.Hex)));",
							"pm.environment.set(\"wsse-header\",'UsernameToken Username=\"' + \"<API User>\" + '\", PasswordDigest=\"' + digest + '\", Created=\"' + ts + '\", nonce=\"' + nonce + '\"');"
						],
						"type": "text/javascript",
						"packages": {}
					}
				}
			],
			"request": {
				"method": "POST",
				"header": [
					{
						"key": "X-WSSE",
						"value": "{{wsse-header}}",
						"type": "text"
					}
				],
				"body": {
					"mode": "raw",
					"raw": "{\n  \"key_id\": \"3\",\n  \"external_id\": \"\",\n  \"data\": null,\n  \"contacts\": [\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact1@email.com\"},\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact2@email.com\"},\n    {\"external_id\": \"contact3@email.com\"}\n  ]\n}",
					"options": {
						"raw": {
							"language": "json"
						}
					}
				},
				"url": {
					"raw": "https://api.emarsys.net/api/v2/event/<EventID>/trigger",
					"protocol": "https",
					"host": [
						"api",
						"emarsys",
						"net"
					],
					"path": [
						"api",
						"v2",
						"event",
						"<EventID>",
						"trigger"
					]
				}
			},
			"response": []
		}
	]
}

 

 

Further Information

There is also a Github page 'Emarsys Postman Collection' which contains a complete collection of most of the Emarsys APIs to import into Postman or Bruno. It also comes with a nice documentation and works with environment setups for better security regarding the credential handling.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi @DoloresCorrea ,

thank you very much for the very informative blog!

We tried to do the same thing as you did and all seems to work as on your screenshots (huray! :)), but we are having issues with the Roles and Authorizations.

We tried to seperate the Roles between 4 different people (1st person creates a change request, 2nd person can approve it, 3rd tests and 4th deployes it), but this did not seem to work. As soon as a person is a Project member, that person can do everything, independant of the role, which was assigned to him

Do you have any ideas what could be wrong, are we missing something?
Thank you!

Best regards,
Goran

entry.title: Re: How to get geolocation data through CDS view?
entry.content:
Hello @ventior,

I'm not sure if you can achive this via a CDS view... at least the SAP Help page describes how to achieve this via a HANA Calculation view: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f7f432923cd9495bb5c98d5cdd667663.html 

Hope this helps anyway... or you find some more hints on these pages.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content: It should be possible, as it can happen that the user has miscounted or something similar. The function should be able to do the same as when you initiate a recount using transaction LI04 or adjust the result using LI12N

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Wroclaw 2024 - Call for papers
entry.content:
I have just submitted two presentation proposals

  • EWM-MFS demystified
  • Integrated logistics planning in SAP standard - implementation challenges and S/4HANA pitfalls

See you there in Wrocław!

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Res...
entry.content:
You didn't use the SAP Extended Warehouse Management tag?

AFAIK L_INV_COUNT and L_INV_COUNT_EXT can do this, but from your error message it may be too late (value of LINV-ISTAT) ?

  • Are you yet able to change this count from LI12N?
  • Check your parameters (internal/external format)

entry.title: Re: Error opening the cursor for the remote database - gr...
entry.content:
Try to materialize/persist the remote table into HANA Cloud like-
Create table <tab_name> as selecr * from <Virtual_table>;
now you can use the group by clause in top of this newly created <tab_name>

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thank you @Katherine_K , i'll surely join the group 🙂

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content: I suspect there is more than a single function call to change a result via LI12N because it sounds like you are referring to changing a result that has already been posted.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Huy. I'm work as new abap developer. And I want to expand my knowledge in SAP BTP.

Thank you for considering my application!

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Res...
entry.content:
The LINK-ISTAT ( and LINV-ISTAT ) are both N, but when using LI12N i can change the value.

What exaclty do you mean by internal/external format. The first time counting works with the same request

entry.title: Re: cl_cds_test_environment for nested CDS views
entry.content:
The CDS Test Double Framework doubles the dependent on entities, not the entity itself. It's intended to test the CDS view itself, as you can see in the help: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/abap-cds-test-double-framework

If you want to double a certain CDS view directly, and not its dependencies, you can use the OSQL Test Double Framework. Something like:

DATA billing_docs TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF I_BillingDocument WITH EMPTY KEY.
billing_docs = VALUE #( ( BillingDocument  = '1234567890'  ) ).
DATA(osql_env) = cl_osql_test_environment=>create( VALUE #( ( 'I_BillingDocument' ) ) ).
osql_env->insert_test_data( billing_docs ).

entry.title: Re: Custom Code Migration app - Known Problems & Solutions
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

I created a snapshot of usage data for the last 13 month in our production system and transferred it to our 
checked system (development system) by RFC import. I can see the transferred usage data in TA SUSG and table SUSG_DATA.

When In try to add the usage data to the check system (S/4 HANA 2023 FPS01) no usage data is availbale for selection. I already extended the authorizations of the user in the RFC destination that is used in the rfc object provider of ATC.
Do you have any idea what I can further check?

Thanks and regards
Jens

entry.title: Re: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Res...
entry.content:
What the exact erreur number, AFAIK only a status value different from 'N' raise this error?

 

      IF LINV-ISTAT <> CON_NICHTGEZAEHLT. " N
        MESSAGE E036(LK) RAISING NO_COUNT_ALLOWED.
      ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: SVT - Issues with...

https://me.sap.com/notes/3097071

Thanks, in advance!

entry.title: Re: How can we enable / trigger Ariba email notifications...
entry.content: Hi, you can use the Prereconciled Invoice reporting fact to pull invoices in Composing status.

entry.title: (Junior) Consultant | SAP Finance & Controlling (m/w/d)
entry.content:
Standorte: Berlin, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt am Main, Hamburg, Leipzig, München, Stuttgart, Walldorf

Deine Benefits

  • Persönliche Weiterentwicklung: Dich erwarten vielfältige Karriereperspektiven in einem unbefristeten Arbeitsvertrag sowie individuelle Förderung durch ein umfangreiches Trainings- und Coachingangebot
  • Vertrauensurlaub: Unser innovatives Konzept ermöglicht es dir, deine Erholungszeiten in Abstimmung mit deinem Team eigenverantwortlich und selbstbestimmt festzulegen
  • Work-Life-Choice: Wir bieten dir hierzu umfangreiche Angebote – dazu zählen u. a. Sabbaticals oder Workation
  • Flexibles Arbeiten: Deine Pläne sind so individuell wie du selbst: Wähle deinen Arbeitsort flexibel – ob beim Kunden, in einer unserer Office Locations oder remote
  • Vergütungsmodell: Du profitierst von unserem attraktiven Modell inklusive eines erfolgsabhängigen Bonus
  • Corporate Benefits: Dazu zählen beispielsweise WellYou Gesundheitsbudget, JobRad-Leasing oder Firmenfitness mit EGYM Wellpass
  • Mentorship: Erfahrene Kolleg:innen stehen dir bei deinem Start und deiner Entwicklung zur Seite
  • Teamspirit: Bei uns werden flache Hierarchien und eine teamorientierte Unternehmenskultur gelebt – darüber hinaus sind ökologische Verantwortung und gesellschaftliches Engagement Teil unserer DNA

Deine zukünftigen Aufgaben

Du hast bereits erste SAP-Erfahrungen, möchtest aber deine Kenntnisse weiter ausbauen? Oder ist SAP noch völliges Neuland für dich und das Thema reizt dich? Tauche mit uns Schritt für Schritt in die SAP-Welt ein und starte deine Karriere in der SAP-Beratung bei BearingPoint!

Unsere SAP S/4 HANA Academy macht dich in nur sechs Wochen zum SAP-Profi und bereitet dich unabhängig deiner bisherigen SAP-Kenntnisse optimal darauf vor, Kunden bei der Gestaltung ihrer Geschäfts- und IT-Prozesse zu unterstützen. Du hast dabei die Möglichkeit dich in Finance und Controlling Themen weiterzubilden und die Academy mit einer ersten Beraterzertifizierung abzuschließen. Jetzt bist du fit dein erstes SAP-Projekt bei einem unserer namhaften Kunden anzutreten.

Diese abwechslungsreichen Aufgaben erwarten dich dabei:

  • Deine Aufgabe wird es sein die Geschäftsprozesse und Anforderungen der Kunden zu verstehen, die Umsetzbarkeit in SAP zu prüfen und anschließend maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu gestalten und zu implementieren.
  • Du nimmst dabei sowohl die Management- als auch die IT-Perspektive ein, steuerst gemeinsam mit deinem Team Kundenprojekte mit Feingefühl sowie fundierter Methodik und unterstützt aktiv bei der Weiterentwicklung unserer innovativen Lösungen. 

Dein Profil

Zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt suchen wir dich als (Junior) Consultant | SAP Finance & Controlling (m/w/d) an den Standorten Berlin, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt am Main, Hamburg, Leipzig, Stuttgart, München und Walldorf.

  • Du hast ein Studium im wirtschaftswissenschaftlichen oder MINT-Bereich erfolgreich absolviert oder bist bereit dein Wissen aus einem fachfremden Studiengang mit Business-Knowhow aufzufrischen
  • Du konntest bereits erste Berufserfahrung durch Praktika in einer Unternehmensberatung, einem Startup oder dem Finanzbereich eines Unternehmens sammeln
  • Erste praktische Erfahrungen mit SAP wünschenswert, aber nicht zwingend erforderlich
  • Deine Leidenschaft für innovative Technologien und deine Freude an der Kundenkommunikation machen dich für uns zu einem Perfect Match
  • Durch unsere international agierende Kundschaft ermöglichen wir eine hybride Arbeitsweise mit einer angemessenen Reisebereitschaft
  • Sehr gute deutsche und gute englische Sprachkenntnisse sind Teil deines Profils 

Das klingt spannend? HIER geht's zur Bewerbung.

 

Together, we are more than Business

BearingPoint ist eine unabhängige Management- und Technologieberatung mit europäischen Wurzeln und globaler Reichweite. Wir bieten Beratung, die Strategie mit Technologie vereint und verbinden Unternehmertum mit Innovationsgeist.

Du machst den Unterschied: Wir geben dir den Raum, du selbst zu sein und dein volles Potenzial zu entfalten. Unabhängig davon, woher du kommst, woran du glaubst oder wen du liebst. Wir stehen ein für Chancengleichheit und Vielfalt. Denn wir sind überzeugt, dass erst Facettenreichtum zu einem starken Miteinander, originellen Ideen und echter Innovation führt. Deshalb sind unsere Teams bunt. Und sie dürfen bunter werden. Perspektivenwechsel statt Stagnation – moving forward mit BearingPoint. Zeig, wer du bist, und engagiere dich als Teil des Teams in einer unserer internen Initiativen: Women@BearingPoint, Proud@BearingPoint, Ability@BearingPoint & More@BearingPoint.

entry.title: (Junior) Consultant SAP Performance Management (m/w/d)
entry.content:
Standorte: Berlin, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt am Main, Hamburg, Leipzig, München, Stuttgart, Walldorf

Deine Benefits

  • Persönliche Weiterentwicklung: Dich erwarten vielfältige Karriereperspektiven in einem unbefristeten Arbeitsvertrag sowie individuelle Förderung durch ein umfangreiches Trainings- und Coachingangebot
  • Vertrauensurlaub: Unser innovatives Konzept ermöglicht es dir, deine Erholungszeiten in Abstimmung mit deinem Team eigenverantwortlich und selbstbestimmt festzulegen
  • Work-Life-Choice: Wir bieten dir hierzu umfangreiche Angebote – dazu zählen u. a. Sabbaticals oder Workation
  • Flexibles Arbeiten: Deine Pläne sind so individuell wie du selbst: Wähle deinen Arbeitsort flexibel – ob beim Kunden, in einer unserer Office Locations oder remote
  • Vergütungsmodell: Du profitierst von unserem attraktiven Modell inklusive eines erfolgsabhängigen Bonus
  • Corporate Benefits: Dazu zählen beispielsweise WellYou Gesundheitsbudget, JobRad-Leasing oder Firmenfitness mit EGYM Wellpass
  • Mentorship: Erfahrene Kolleg:innen stehen dir bei deinem Start und deiner Entwicklung zur Seite
  • Teamspirit: Bei uns werden flache Hierarchien und eine teamorientierte Unternehmenskultur gelebt – darüber hinaus sind ökologische Verantwortung und gesellschaftliches Engagement Teil unserer DNA

Deine zukünftigen Aufgaben

Gemeinsam gestalten wir die Zukunft des Next Generation SAP – als SAP Gold Partner bieten wir Raum für deine persönliche Entwicklung zum/zur SAP Analytics Expert:in. Als Consultant spielst du eine zentrale Rolle bei der Gestaltung der Zukunftsfähigkeit unserer internationalen Kunden. Dein Fokus liegt dabei auf S/4HANA und SAP Analytics Lösungen für Planung und Reporting.

So kannst du uns unterstützen:

  • Du konzipierst betriebswirtschaftliche Konzepte, entwirfst technische Designs und setzt moderne SAP Analytics-Architekturen und Lösungen um
  • Du organisierst und leitest Workshops und Schulungen, um unsere Kunden bestmöglich zu unterstützen
  • Du arbeitest eng mit unserer SAP BI Community zusammen und trägst zur Weiterentwicklung unserer bestehenden Lösungen bei
  • Schrittweise übernimmst du (Teil-)Projektverantwortung und trägst zum Erfolg unserer Projekte bei
  • Du unterstützt uns bei Sales-Aktivitäten und Business Development, um unser Kundennetzwerk weiter auszubauen

Dein Profil

  • Du hast dein Studium der Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Wirtschaftsinformatik, Wirtschaftsingenieurswesen oder eines vergleichbaren Studiengangs erfolgreich abgeschlossen
  • Du verfügst über gute betriebswirtschaftliche Kenntnisse in den Bereichen Performance Management, Finance, Controlling und Integration in der Logistik
  • Es wäre von Vorteil, wenn du erste Kenntnisse in SAP S/4HANA und SAP Analytics hast
  • Des Weiteren bist du bereit, national und international zu reisen
  • Sehr gute deutsche und englische Sprachkenntnisse runden dein Profil ab

Das klingt spannend? HIER geht's zur Bewerbung.

 

Together, we are more than Business

BearingPoint ist eine unabhängige Management- und Technologieberatung mit europäischen Wurzeln und globaler Reichweite. Wir bieten Beratung, die Strategie mit Technologie vereint und verbinden Unternehmertum mit Innovationsgeist.

Du machst den Unterschied: Wir geben dir den Raum, du selbst zu sein und dein volles Potenzial zu entfalten. Unabhängig davon, woher du kommst, woran du glaubst oder wen du liebst. Wir stehen ein für Chancengleichheit und Vielfalt. Denn wir sind überzeugt, dass erst Facettenreichtum zu einem starken Miteinander, originellen Ideen und echter Innovation führt. Deshalb sind unsere Teams bunt. Und sie dürfen bunter werden. Perspektivenwechsel statt Stagnation – moving forward mit BearingPoint. Zeig, wer du bist, und engagiere dich als Teil des Teams in einer unserer internen Initiativen: Women@BearingPoint, Proud@BearingPoint, Ability@BearingPoint & More@BearingPoint.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
Not those ones, what you are looking for is the OCI*.dll

Open 64 bit ODBC Admin and create a new System DSN, under the drivers you should see Oracle, or you could use the CR Oracle client.

Check with your Oracle DB Administrator and ask him/her for help getting the correct client installed.

Check this Database Excel file for the Oracle Client you need to use:

7PUBLIC© 2023 SAP SE or an SAP affiliate company. All rights reserved. ǀ
Data Access
Please consult the file:
CR 2020 Data Access

entry.title: Line item type 07009 (cumulative interest) not available for asset migration?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to migrate asset postings to S/4HANA Public Cloud. For this purpose, we have activated an additional depreciation area for asset accounting and want to migrate the accumulated interest. According to the XML template file, there is the line item type 07009 for accumulated interest.

I get the message

"Line item type 07009 for cumulated transfer values is invalid".

Is this line item type not supported or did we do anything wrong?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Function 'Set Process Control' not working while posting a Journal Entry Voucher
entry.content:
Why does the system allows posting of a Journal Entry Voucher even though the posting date is after the date specified in 'Entry Possible Until' field in Set Process Control setting?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Function 'Set Process Control' not working while post...
entry.content:
For postings which are generated from financial accounting work centers, for example, posting of a journal entry vouchers, the function Set Process Control is not relevant.

The system checks the settings of the Set Process Control functions only when postings are generated from work centers outside of financial accounting, such as supplier invoices, goods and service receipts, and customer invoices.

entry.title: Mdk Video recording
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on new functionalities for my MDK app and I wonder if it is possible to upload/take video from the attachment component?

Or i had to implement and extension and nativescript plugins.

entry.title: Third-party cookies deprecation for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding SAP Commerce Cloud: Is it equipped to handle or does it offer support for third-party cookies? I've been unable to locate any articles addressing this topic within the Commerce documentation. We're currently encountering issues due to enabling the cookie phase-out option in Chrome.

While I'm aware of the CHIPS solution recommended by Google, I'm hoping for official support from SAP Commerce.

Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

SAP Commerce Cloud

entry.title: Data Archiving from SAP Hana Cloud DB / BTP
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have some requirements where we need to archive data from Hana Cloud DB on BTP after some time. We have been trying to find options, however unable to find anything standard provided by SAP on BTP for Hana Cloud.

We have SAP ILM Enabled Archiving concepts on S/4Hana for archiving, we are looking for something similar on BTP.

If you have something similar implemented, please suggest how / what is SAP doing for Data Archiving from Hana Cloud DB / Data models.

Thanks,

Rakesh

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content: I have a OCI.DLL under Oracle_Home, bin directory. Its version is 19.3.0.0. Should I use it?

entry.title: Re: Develop a Side-by-Side CAP-Based Extension Application Following the SAP BTP Developer’s Guide
entry.content: Great Post, It has comprehensive information regarding extensibility, remote service with great in depth technical implementation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Adding Attachments to a Standard XML
entry.content:
Hi,

First off, thanks for blog (and the sample code).

One thing I find missing is where can we find the right component in the proxy structure to include this embedded XML.

The usecase depicted here is for Portugal. What if we're talking about another country? (Romania or Germany where these are requirements, for example)

I would very much like to know how to find the right component in the Invoice/Credit Note Proxy Structure for each Country where we are allowed to embed another file.

Thanks again.

--

Pedro Cerveira Pinto

entry.title: Re: Update Manager Position in Position Object
entry.content:
Hi @ManishJaiswal,

Thanks. As per my understanding, Automated Hierarchy Adaptation is used to fix hierarchy inconsistencies from Position to Job Information but not from Job Information to Position.
I am looking for an option to fix hierarchy inconsistencies from Job Information to Position.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Manage the "required field" property on Position obje...
entry.content:
Please write UI Configuration rule (Manage UI Rule in Manage Configuration UI) based upon your condition to make a field required for Position Object.

Thanks.

entry.title: Stock in transit reverse
entry.content:
Hi

We did a transfer stock between two plants using transportation functionality. We received the stock in the receiving plant through O4H1. This confirmation created a 101 movement type. User reversed 101 movement type through MIGO and this action increased the stock in transit.

How can i received again this stock o return to the issue plant? Shimpment document is in status 6. 

Purchase order UB

Delivery and shipment (movement types 311 and 641)

Receiving shipment O4H1 (movement type 101)

User reverse movement type 101/102

Stock goes to transit...

I need to receive this stock in transit again or move to issue plant.

Thanks

entry.title: Finance issue
entry.content: 1.When I start using the 5MQ,when I use the scheme about 'Make to Order',I discover the G/L Account is not correct.Details are given below. 2.First,in 'Accounting 1' of my meterial view,the Valuation Class is '2200'and the 'BSX' Account is 14050201,the 'VC:Sale Ord. Stk' is '7920' and the 'BSX' Account is 14070001. 3.Second,when I use the scheme 'Make to Order',materials received after producion, a material certificate was generated and an accounting document was produced. 4.Third,the account document is Dr:14070001(BSX)(7920)  Cr:50012102(GBB),the  material document's Movement type is '101' and Special Stock is 'E'. 5.Fifth,when I make the material movement from 'E' to 'E' by the movement type'687',an accounting document is generated,it is Dr:14070001(BSX)(7920)  Cr:14070001(BSX)(7920). 6.The results above are not what I wish. 7.I wish that the document is Dr:14050201(BSX)(2200)  Cr:50012102(GBB) when I do the material movement by movement type '101' and special stock 'E' and the document is Dr:14070001(BSX)(7920)  Cr:14050201(BSX)(2200) when I do the material movement by movement type'687' and special stock 'E'. 8.Of course,when I choose the movement type'687',the special stock can not 'E'.But,I need the result about the accounting document. 9.How could I do this? Whether this product can be implemented?

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Customer Project Billing Item Detail chang...
entry.content:
Hi @Dave_He  - Thanks for your reply. The Display Security Audit log app mentioned in your link doesn't appear to have any details of the transactions or any way that I can see to capture the billing item distinctly. It doesn't show what changed (it just shows that an individual ran an abap program), and the application tab just appears to show S000.

Can you please provide more details on how this app can be used to see what changed in a customer project billing item like you would in a normal change log.

I don't know why the ability to access a change log directly in a customer project and its elements isn't ubiquitous within the app as a UI standard.

Best Regards,

 

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sale...
entry.content:
What makes you create multiple threads for the same question? 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/half-full-pallet-order-quantity-prerequisite-for-sales-order-creation/qaq-p/13713698

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/half-full-pallet-order-quantity-prerequisite-for-sales-order-creation/qaq-p/13713691

Typically this requirement can be achieved by creating a Custom (Z) Table where Customer Numbers are mentioned and a Code in one of the Sales Order Under Exits will check the fields of Min.order qty, Min. dely qty and Delivery unit, in Material Master (for the Customers in Z-Table) maintained as per Business requirement and issue error message. A separate code can also send Email to Business User (for example a Customer Service Executive mentioned in the Cusotmer Master). 

However since you are working on Public Cloud edition, you will have to reach out to SAP Support for this enhancement. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Help Shorty - HTML5 Configuration issue "Failed to get Metadata - 400"
entry.content:
@ruthkb I am sorry for the late reply but sometimes it can be a problem with the destination service.

There was a SAP internal problem around your question with the deployment of existing destination services and I had to delete one of mine and redeploy the whole application

entry.title: Bringing serialized material back in to inventory after it was issued out?
entry.content: We have a scenario where a serialized material is issued out. In SAP it has status of AVLB but assigned no stock type, plant or storage location. Business would like to bring that same material/serial number back into inventory. Is this possible and what would be the best practice to do so?

entry.title: Re: No Shipping Tab in newly created document type for Re...
entry.content:
Hello Sabarinathan,

We have a KBA where you can check about shipping tab in "Return Purchase Order". Please check in the following link: KBA 2831464 - Return to Supplier no shipping data determined.

Please check this document and return if it did not solve your issue.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: How to search for only one property in Object Table o...
entry.content: Could you share how do you get Customers based on the product on the page?

entry.title: Custom Journal Entry Type
entry.content:
Is there somewhere customizable for the "Journal Entry Type" in the Journal Entry document?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom Journal Entry Type
entry.content:
As per help center documentation: Journal Entry Types and Number Ranges – Configuration Guide

Journal entry types are used to classify journal entries by filtering and selecting journal entries for the same type of business transaction. Journal entry types are also used to ensure that journal entries of the same type receive journal entry IDs from the same number range.

The journal entry types are predefined and cannot be changed. However, you can create additional journal entry types for journal entries generated by journal entry vouchers in the general ledger.

For more information, see Journal Entry Types and Number Ranges.

You can check the follow below steps to create a custom journal entry type.

Business Configuration>Journal Entry Types and Number Ranges

Click on Edit Journal Entry Types

In this screen you can define the journal entry types for manual entries. For all other business transactions journal entry types are provided automatically and cannot be changed.

You can also find the available Journal Entry types here.

entry.title: Re: Recommended way to stream changes from S4HANA to Micr...
entry.content:
I think you might be able to do that with Replication Flows and SAP Datasphere. With an ADLS as Sink, and a Shortcut in Microsoft Fabric pointing to that ADLS (Azure Data Lake Storage).

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
Yes but you can't select it directly.

In the Database Wizard expand either ODBC, after you have created a DSN or select OLE dB, enter the Server Name and log on info or you can expand the Oracle option and same, enter the server name and log on info. That is CR's direct Oracle driver and it uses the OCI client directly.

Note: I don't have the Oracle Client installed so I don't see any connection info.

What you were attempting to use is the Oracles .NET client, that client is to be used in a .NET application and not directly in Crystal Reports. Which is likely why there was such a delay.

Dell I believe pointed all of this out to you.

entry.title: Re: Data Migration in SAP Activate
entry.content: thanks for the detailed explanation.

entry.title: Re: Mdk Video recording
entry.content:
MDK Attachment control on

  • iOS allows you to attach a video via Photo Library, Take Photo option (and switch to VIDEO mode) and Files options available in its AttachmentActionType property.
  • Android allows you to upload video via Select File option available in its AttachmentActionType property.

You can try this out in the MDK Mentor app available as part of "SAP Mobile Services Client" on public stores.

entry.title: Re: Can a custom event trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
You can still make workaround - trigger iflow by custom event and by iflow trigger api of BUILD SPA. 

It is one more (unnecessary in case that BUILD will be triggerable by custom event itself), but at least it will allow to use custom events in present state of BUILD.

entry.title: Header "Cookie" converted to SHA256 automatically in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Third party vendor's API is using header "Cookie" for Authentication. For example, value of "Cookie" is fastemsssotoken=7b681045d1083a0a003ba4c94e0220f047cfd876015b96b4dc10938f08602d6542. I have created header "Cookie" in the Content Modifier before connecting to the API using HTTP Adapter and assigned the above-mentioned value by setting the Source Type as Constant. But SAP CI is converting it to SHA256. Please refer the attached screenshot. The API is not accepting the SHA256 value and throwing http error 403. Please provide any solution/workaround.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Amey

entry.title: Is it possible to add a custom card to a standard overview page app like Maintenance Planner (F2828)
entry.content:
I want to add a custom card to an Fiori overview page (maintenance planner F2828) and I couldn't find a way to do it. Also all the blogs I found always create a custom overview page from scratch.

So ist it possible, and if it is possible, can anyone point me to the right direction in solving this?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hi David,

Is it too late to register for the program? If not, how can I get an invite or registration link?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud infrastructure is moving to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If we have updates to the schedule for migration they will be added to the blog. There are currently no updates to the information. We plan to begin migrations in the second half of 2024.

Adrian

entry.title: Re: Trade Finance Letter of Credit (Buy & Sell) in SAP Treasury
entry.content:
Hi 

Could I please ask if this solution is compatible with SAP Business One ??

entry.title: Exposing a SOAP service in BTP, ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to expose as SOAP-based web service in a BTP, ABAP environment. Is there a more detailed descripton than [this](https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/generate-provider-proxies-from-wsdl-files)?

I can create the SOAP provider model and add my coding to a the respective (generated) class, but I fail to create the communication scenario (which actually exposes the service?)

Any help is highly appreciated

 

Felix

entry.title: Embedded SAC in Intelligent Sales&Service Cloud V2: Planning
entry.content: hello SAP Experts, does the embedded SAC support "planning," or is the "Planning Module" included?

entry.title: SAP University Alliances at AUSAPE Forum 2024 (Granada, Spain)
entry.content:
SAP University Alliances participated to AUSAPE Forum in Granada (Spain) on 28-29 May. It is the largest Event of SAP User Group in Spain. This year it brought together over 1000 participants from SAP partners and clients.

Please have a look to Video summary.

AUSAPE Forum opened with a Welcome video from SAP CEO Christian Klein. SAP Spain COO Ana Oró and Customer Advisory Director Jesús Martinez delivered Keynote on SAP AI strategy.

SAP Spain T&A Director Juan Pedro Garcia and SAP University Alliances Manager Igor Belousov lead the Session on Employment. SAP Spain MD Felix Monedero, representatives of the local governments from Andalucía, Extremadura, Madrid participated to the roundtable during the Session.

SAP University Alliances presented such program as SAP Next-Gen projects with clients and partners. We have also had working meetings with SAP Platinum Partner SEIDOR, EY, Amazon AWS, other partners and clients discussing collaboration on SAP next-gen projects with Spanish Universities.

entry.title: Embedded SAC in Intelligent Sales&Service Cloud V2: integration via service
entry.content: hi SAP Experts, can data (sources) from the embedded SAC be read out for further integrations via service?

entry.title: Re: Which BAPI can update POD relevance on sales order cr...
entry.content: Thank you so much for the solution！

entry.title: Re: Unable to import BPA project to CoE tenant
entry.content: Hello, the BPA team has confirmed that it's not possible to migrate projects from Canary to Productive tenants. We need to redo the projects in the productive one, sadly.

entry.title: Job Profile Builder- Best Practices on Configuration
entry.content: We are currently working to implement Job Profile Builder into the SuccessFactors. The way our system is currently set up, we have multiple Job Titles/Positions mapped to the same Job Classification. We are seeking guidance on how to create generic job profiles for each job classification/job code. Do you have separate sections within the job profile for each job title? Do you leverage tokens? Looking to connect to learn more.

entry.title: Attachment issue on sales document
entry.content: Hello Experts， I have activated user parameter SD_SWU_ACTIVE. Set PDF in tcode SOPE. Upload PDF file on sales document. But no content displays in the file. Does any one know the root cause？

entry.title: Re: How to extract payment currency details updated for e...
entry.content: Thank you Bo - for providing the details regarding I_WrkAssgmtPaymentTP_1.

entry.title: SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools
entry.content:
SAP Fiori tools May 2024 release adds closer integration with ABAP Development Tools 

With the 2405 client release of ABAP Development Tools (ADT), combined with the latest SAP Fiori tools release, users can now have a more integrated experience when working between ADT at the backend and SAP Fiori tools for front-end development.    No longer does the developer need to manually switch between the tooling environments and remember which system and entity they wish to use.   Instead, with one button click in ADT, users can seamlessly switch from ABAP to SAP Fiori development. 

As mentioned in our SAP Fiori tools March update, SAP Fiori tools now enables users to launch the Application Generator directly from ADT and skip having to select a data source and entity in the generator if they already have the SAP system and entity chosen in ADT.    With the 2405 client release of ADT, the development work has been completed and the feature is available to our cloud customers. 

Setting up ADT integration with SAP Fiori tools 

You can choose to either launch the Application Generator from SAP Fiori tools in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) in your browser or directly launch Visual Studio Code locally if that is your preferred integrated development environment (IDE).   

The first step is to configure the integration between ADT and SAP Fiori tools.  This is a one-time setup within ADT for each system you want to integrate. 

  • Choose the system you want to integrate, right-click on it and select ‘Properties’.  From here, choose ‘ABAP Development -> IDE Configuration’.   
  • Enable the `Configure the target IDE` checkbox and decide whether you wish to launch SAP Business Application Studio or Visual Studio Code.   

Below I’ll detail how you can get started in either scenario. 

Integrating with SAP Business Application Studio  

When working with SAP Business Application Studio, you will need the following items: 

  • URL: The URL of your Business Application Studio landscape. 
  • Development Space ID: The ID development space in Business Application Studio that you have already created.  The development space must include SAP Fiori tools as an installed SAP extension. 

The following development spaces will have SAP Fiori tools pre-installed: 

  • SAP Fiori 
  • Full-Stack Application Using Productivity Tools 
  • Full Stack Cloud Application 

 

  • Destination Name: In order for the ABAP system to be available in SAP Business Application Studio, it must be configured as a destination in your SAP BTP cockpit.  Once the destination has been created, enter the destination name in this box. 

 

The system settings for SAP Fiori tools integration in ADT 

Integrating with Visual Studio Code 

If you wish to work with Visual Studio Code, you only need to check the relevant checkbox in system settings.  However, you will then need to ensure the following are installed: 

  • Visual Studio Code: You will need the Visual Studio Code editor installed locally.  If not available, you will see an error message when attempting to launch SAP Fiori tools from ADT. 
  • SAP Fiori tools:  SAP Fiori tools should be installed from the Visual Studio Code marketplace.  If the tools are not installed, then Visual Studio Code will ask you if you want to install them when you try and launch from ADT. 
  • Saved SAP System: You must have an SAP Saved System stored in Visual Studio Code that refers to your ABAP system.  This will ensure that the Application Generator can automatically launch and connect to the system within Visual Studio Code.  For more details on SAP Saved Systems, please see here. 

 

Creating your SAP Fiori project 

Once configured, you will see a new button alongside the service details in ADT.  “Create Fiori Project” will launch your IDE environment and automatically start the SAP Fiori generator with these system details.   

 “Create Fiori Project” button to launch the SAP Fiori Generator 

Once the SAP Fiori generator launches, the data source selection step will be skipped (you’ve already selected your data source in ADT), and the main entity for your template will be pre-selected with the entity chosen in ADT. 

More integrations with ADT coming soon 

There are other enhancements planned between the development environments to make life easier for developers when working between ADT and SAP Fiori tools.  Standby for more information in the coming months. 

 

Let me finish by summarizing the power of both tools and why integrating between them is something we are focused on.  ADT provides a dedicated ABAP development perspective within the Eclipse IDE which makes it easier for developers to navigate and work with ABAP code.  Developers can efficiently build and maintain backend logic, business logic, and data models using ADT's comprehensive suite of tools.  On the other hand, SAP Fiori tools offer a rich set of UI controls, templates, and design principles for creating modern and intuitive user interfaces.   

This integration empowers developers to effortlessly navigate from ADT to SAP Fiori tools, streamlining their workflow, enhancing productivity, and ultimately enabling developers to deliver high-quality applications more rapidly and effectively.

entry.title: BP creation according to BP category chosen
entry.content:
Hello

I am looking for a way to have the system proposing a different selection of BP grouping based on the BP CATEGORY the user choose when creating a new business partner.

Exemple:

--> I want to create a new BP, BP CATEGORY person: the system will allow me to create within the BP grouping X,Y or Z

--> I want to create a new BP, BP CATEGORY organization: the system will allow me to create within the BP grouping A, B or C.

 

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Dump while getting data from custom table using RAP application
entry.content:
I have created an app using RAP model. It is able to insert data into custom table while trying to fetch data, its leading to short dump. Below are the details.
Custom table

 

CDS

Behaviour definition

service definition

service binding

app

The below records were inserted using CREATE operation in app. When i try to fetch data using GO button getting below dump

Please let me know if anyone has got clue

entry.title: i have a lot business partner that have to be disable, how can i mass change them?
entry.content: hello, im newbie in this SAP things, how can i mass change business partner data? i've been using MASS with LFA1 but no data meet the selection criteria, do i missed something?. thanks a lot for the answer
